12:I[91402,["4367","static/chunks/d30757c7-6653120e5c8a63f0.js","3495","static/chunks/f5890c91-2f2074f8da46bf26.js","4574","static/chunks/38198bdd-71bb47bdde1d84f0.js","6281","static/chunks/d86b74c0-c5e18e895943bc06.js","7390","static/chunks/7390-54a3d1da81e7a25e.js","5406","static/chunks/5406-45420c634d834e4a.js","4104","static/chunks/4104-bbac26ad121beec3.js","7856","static/chunks/7856-4d580745acc4b960.js","265","static/chunks/265-5ebc2ab2553082c7.js","2863","static/chunks/2863-15f82d6625b6e31c.js","3576","static/chunks/3576-c631998f5ea77a37.js","5812","static/chunks/5812-9c9ef7c7344e0961.js","2115","static/chunks/2115-c83bc7ff6fd259b7.js","4122","static/chunks/4122-b247722f5271c02e.js","308","static/chunks/app/blog/%5Bslug%5D/page-b6e80e79c15dd5f0.js"],"ThemeSwitcher"]
e:T616,import { component$ } from '@builder.io/qwik';
import { Form, routeLoader$ } from '@builder.io/qwik-city';
import { TodoContext, db } from '@qwik-todo-app/data-access';

export const useGetTodos = routeLoader$(() => {
  // A network request or db connection could be made here to fetch persisted todos
  // For illustrative purposes, we're going to seed a rudimentary in-memory DB if it hasn't been already
  // Then return the value from it
  if (db.get('todos')?.length === 0) {
    db.set('todos', [
      {
        id: 1,
        message: 'First todo',
      },
    ]);
  }
  const todos: Todo[] = db.get('todos');
  const lastId = [...todos].sort((a, b) => b.id - a.id)[0].id;
  return { todos, lastId };
});
export default component$(() => {
  const todoStore = useContext(TodoContext);
  const persistedTodos = useGetTodos();
  useTask$(({ track }) => {
    track(() => persistedTodos.value);
    if (persistedTodos.value) {
      todoStore.todos = persistedTodos.value.todos;
      todoStore.lastId =
        todoStore.lastId > persistedTodos.value.lastId
          ? todoStore.lastId
          : persistedTodos.value.lastId;
    }
  });
  return (
    <div>
      <h1>Todos</h1>
      {todoStore.todos.map((t) => (
        <div key={`todo-${t.id}`}>
          <label>
            <input type="checkbox" /> {t.message}
          </label>
        </div>
      ))}
      <Form>
        <input type="hidden" name="id" value={1} />
        <input type="text" name="message" />
        <button type="submit">Add</button>
      </Form>
    </div>
  );
});
f:T7b1,import { component$ } from '@builder.io/qwik';
import { Form, routeLoader$ } from '@builder.io/qwik-city';
import { TodoContext, db } from '@qwik-todo-app/data-access';

export const useGetTodos = routeLoader$(() => {
  // A network request or db connection could be made here to fetch persisted todos
  // For illustrative purposes, we're going to seed a rudimentary in-memory DB if it hasn't been already
  // Then return the value from it
  if (db.get('todos')?.length === 0) {
    db.set('todos', [
      {
        id: 1,
        message: 'First todo',
      },
    ]);
  }
  const todos: Todo[] = db.get('todos');
  const lastId = [...todos].sort((a, b) => b.id - a.id)[0].id;
  return { todos, lastId };
});
export const useAddTodo = routeAction$(
  (todo: { id: string; message: string }) => {
    const success = db.add('todos', {
      id: parseInt(todo.id),
      message: todo.message,
    });
    return { success };
  },
  zod$({ id: z.string(), message: z.string() })
);
export default component$(() => {
  const todoStore = useContext(TodoContext);
  const persistedTodos = useGetTodos();
  const addTodoAction = useAddTodo();

  useTask$(({ track }) => {
    track(() => persistedTodos.value);
    if (persistedTodos.value) {
      todoStore.todos = persistedTodos.value.todos;
      todoStore.lastId =
        todoStore.lastId > persistedTodos.value.lastId
          ? todoStore.lastId
          : persistedTodos.value.lastId;
    }
  });
  return (
    <div>
      <h1>Todos</h1>
      {todoStore.todos.map((t) => (
        <div key={`todo-${t.id}`}>
          <label>
            <input type="checkbox" /> {t.message}
          </label>
        </div>
      ))}
      <Form action={addTodoAction}>
        <input type="hidden" name="id" value={todoStore.lastId + 1} />
        <input type="text" name="message" />
        <button type="submit">Add</button>
      </Form>
      {addTodoAction.value?.success && <p>Todo added!</p>}
    </div>
  );
});
10:T570,import { component$, useContext, useTask$ } from '@builder.io/qwik';
import {
  Form,
  routeAction$,
  routeLoader$,
  z,
  zod$,
} from '@builder.io/qwik-city';
import { addTodo, getTodos, TodoContext } from '@acme/data-access';

export const useGetTodos = routeLoader$(() => getTodos());
export const useAddTodo = routeAction$(
  (todo) => addTodo(todo),
  zod$({ id: z.string(), message: z.string() })
);
export default component$(() => {
  const todoStore = useContext(TodoContext);
  const persistedTodos = useGetTodos();
  const addTodoAction = useAddTodo();
  useTask$(({ track }) => {
    track(() => persistedTodos.value);
    if (persistedTodos.value) {
      todoStore.todos = persistedTodos.value.todos;
      todoStore.lastId =
        todoStore.lastId > persistedTodos.value.lastId
          ? todoStore.lastId
          : persistedTodos.value.lastId;
    }
  });
  return (
    <div>
      <h1>Todos</h1>
      {todoStore.todos.map((t) => (
        <div key={`todo-${t.id}`}>
          <label>
            <input type="checkbox" /> {t.message}
          </label>
        </div>
      ))}
      <Form action={addTodoAction}>
        <input type="hidden" name="id" value={todoStore.lastId + 1} />
        <input type="text" name="message" />
        <button type="submit">Add</button>
      </Form>
      {addTodoAction.value?.success && <p>Todo added!</p>}
    </div>
  );
});
11:T4ef,M20.317 4.3698a19.7913 19.7913 0 00-4.8851-1.5152.0741.0741 0 00-.0785.0371c-.211.3753-.4447.8648-.6083 1.2495-1.8447-.2762-3.68-.2762-5.4868 0-.1636-.3933-.4058-.8742-.6177-1.2495a.077.077 0 00-.0785-.037 19.7363 19.7363 0 00-4.8852 1.515.0699.0699 0 00-.0321.0277C.5334 9.0458-.319 13.5799.0992 18.0578a.0824.0824 0 00.0312.0561c2.0528 1.5076 4.0413 2.4228 5.9929 3.0294a.0777.0777 0 00.0842-.0276c.4616-.6304.8731-1.2952 1.226-1.9942a.076.076 0 00-.0416-.1057c-.6528-.2476-1.2743-.5495-1.8722-.8923a.077.077 0 01-.0076-.1277c.1258-.0943.2517-.1923.3718-.2914a.0743.0743 0 01.0776-.0105c3.9278 1.7933 8.18 1.7933 12.0614 0a.0739.0739 0 01.0785.0095c.1202.099.246.1981.3728.2924a.077.077 0 01-.0066.1276 12.2986 12.2986 0 01-1.873.8914.0766.0766 0 ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://qwik.dev/docs/qwikcity/","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"Learn more about directory-based routing with Qwik City","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],"."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"qwik-nx"}]," plugin can help generate new routes within our application. logic."]}],["$","$Ld",null,{"language":"shell","fileName":"","highlightLines":[],"lineGroups":{},"command":"","title":"","path":"","skipRescope":false,"enableCopy":true,"lineWrap":0,"children":"nx g standard Qwik Component."}],["$","p",null,{"children":["If you run ",["$","code",null,{"children":"nx serve todo"}]," and navigate to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"http://localhost:4200/todo"}]," This helps to create a much stronger boundary between modules and features in your application as libraries have a public API (the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"index.ts"}]," file), allowing you to control exactly what can be accessed by consumers."]}],["$","blockquote",null,{"children":[["$","p",null,{"children":["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/features/enforce-module-boundaries","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"Learn more about defining and ensuring project boundaries in the Nx docs.","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"By doing this, you start to build out a project graph for your workspace and your application. Defining your architecture in this manner also helps to reduce the areas in your application that each change affects."}],["$","p",null,{"children":["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/concepts/mental-model#the-project-graph","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"Learn {\n  component$,\n  createContextId,\n  Slot,\n  useContextProvider,\n  useStore,\n} from '@builder.io/qwik';\nimport { Todo } from './api';\n\ninterface TodoStore {\n  todos: Todo[];\n  lastId: number;\n}\n\nexport const TodoContext = createContextId<TodoStore>('todo.context');\nexport const TodoContextProvider = component$(() => {\n  const todoStore = useStore<TodoStore>({\n    todos: [],\n    lastId: 0,\n  });\n  useContextProvider(TodoContext, todoStore);\n  return <Slot />;\n});\n"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"This will create our Context and set up a Store within our application to store the todos. Qwik takes advantage of signals to update state and inform the framework of which components need to be re-rendered when the state changes."}],["$","blockquote",null,{"children":["$","p",null,{"children":["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://qwik.dev/docs/components/state/","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"Learn more about how Qwik uses Signals.","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]}]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Finally, let's update the public entry point to the library to expose our Context and Interface."}],["$","h2",null,{"id":"using-the-context","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["Using the Context",["$","$Lb",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#using-the-context","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100","children":[null,["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","d":"M13.19 8.688a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 1.242 7.244l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-6.364-6.364l1.757-1.757m13.35-.622 1.757-1.757a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-6.364-6.364l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 1.242 7.244"}]]}]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Let's update the root page to add our Context Provider. /**\n   * The root of a QwikCity site always start with the <QwikCityProvider> component,\n   * immediately followed by the document's <head> and <body>.\n   *\n   * Don't remove the `<head>` and `<body>` elements.\n   */\n  useStyles$(globalStyles);\n  return (\n    <QwikCityProvider>\n      <TodoContextProvider>\n        <head>\n          <meta charSet=\"utf-8\" />\n          <link rel=\"manifest\" href=\"/manifest.json\" />\n          <RouterHead />\n        </head>\n        <body lang=\"en\">\n          <RouterOutlet />\n          <ServiceWorkerRegister />\n        </body>\n      </TodoContextProvider>\n    </QwikCityProvider>\n  );\n});\n"}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Update ",["$","code",null,{"children":"libs/data-access/src/index.ts"}]," to match the { component$ } from '@builder.io/qwik';\nimport { Form } from '@builder.io/qwik-city';\nimport { TodoContext } from '@qwik-todo-app/data-access';\n\nexport default component$(() => {\n  const todoStore = useContext(TodoContext);\n  return (\n    <div>\n      <h1>Todos</h1>\n      {todoStore.todos.map((t) => (\n        <div key={`todo-${t.id}`}>\n          <label>\n            <input application you will no longer see any todos listed. Let's fix that!"}],["$","h2",null,{"id":"adding-a-routeloader-to-load-data-on-navigation","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":[["Adding a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"routeLoader$"}]," to load data on Navigation"],["$","$Lb",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#adding-a-routeloader-to-load-data-on-navigation","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100","children":[null,["$","path",null,{"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","d":"M13.19 8.688a4.5 4.5 0 0 1 1.242 7.244l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 1-6.364-6.364l1.757-1.757m13.35-.622 1.757-1.757a4.5 4.5 0 0 0-6.364-6.364l-4.5 4.5a4.5 4.5 0 0 0 1.242 7.244"}]]}]}]]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Qwik allows you to fetch data when a route is navigated to, allowing you to fetch data before the page is rendered. The data will be fetched on the server before the component is rendered and downloaded to the client."}],["$","blockquote",null,{"children":["$","p",null,{"children":["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://qwik.dev/docs/route-loader/","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"Learn more about routeLoader$.","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]}]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["It does this by providing a function called ",["$","code",null,{"children":"routeLoader$"}],". We'll use this function to preload our store with some todos that will theoretically exist in a database."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"For this blog post, we'll create an in-memory db to store some initial todos."}],["$","p",null,{"children":["We'll start by updating our ",["$","code",null,{"children":"libs/data-access/src/lib/api.ts"}]," to add our in-memory DB."]}],["$","$Ld",null,{"language":"ts","fileName":"libs/data-access/src/lib/api.ts","highlightLines":[],"lineGroups":{},"command":"","title":"","path":"","skipRescope":false,"enableCopy":true,"lineWrap":0,"children":"export interface Todo {\n  id: number;\n  message: string;\n}\n\ninterface DB {\n  store: Record<string, any[]>;\n  get: (storeName: string) => any[];\n  set: (storeName: string, value: any[]) => boolean;\n  add: (storeName: string, value: any) => boolean;\n}\nexport const db: DB = {\n  store: { todos: [] },\n  get(storeName) {\n    return db.store[storeName];\n  },\n  set(storeName, value) {\n    try {\n      db.store[storeName] = value;\n      return true;\n    } catch (e) {\n      return false;\n    }\n  },\n  add(storeName, value) {\n    try {\n      db.store[storeName].push(value);\n      return true;\n    } catch (e) {\n      return false;\n    }\n  },\n};\n"}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Now that we have this, let's use it in our ",["$","code",null,{"children":"/todo"}]," route to load some data when the user navigates to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"/todo"}],"."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Update ",["$","code",null,{"children":"apps/todo/src/routes/todo/index.tsx"}]," to match the We can now add todos to our application!"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"However, you might have noticed that our file is starting to get very long. Not only that there's a lot of logic in the route file itself. Let's use Nx to separate the logic into the library we created earlier to keep logic collocated."}],["$","h2",null,{"id":"improve-the-architecture","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["Improve the Architecture",["$","$Lb",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#improve-the-architecture","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 24","strokeWidth":1.5,"stroke":"currentColor","aria-hidden":"true","data-slot":"icon","aria-labelledby":"$undefined","className":"mb-1 ml-2 inline h-5 w-5 opacity-0 ",["$","code",null,{"children":"libs/data-access/src/lib/todos.ts"}]," and move the logic for loading and adding todos into their own functions:"]}],["$","$Ld",null,{"language":"ts","fileName":"libs/data-access/src/lib/todos.ts","highlightLines":[],"lineGroups":{},"command":"","title":"","path":"","skipRescope":false,"enableCopy":true,"lineWrap":0,"children":"import { db, Todo } from './api';\n\nexport function getTodos() {\n  // A network request or db connection could be made here to fetch persisted todos\n  // For illustrative purposes, we're going to seed a rudimentary in-memory DB if it hasn't been already\n  // Then return the value from it\n  if (db.get('todos')?.length === 0) {\n    db.set('todos', [\n      {\n        id: 1,\n        message: 'First todo',\n      },\n    ]);\n  }\n  const todos: Todo[] = db.get('todos');\n  const lastId = [...todos].sort((a, b) => b.id - a.id)[0].id;\n  return { todos, lastId };\n}\nexport function addTodo(todo: { id: string; message: string }) {\n  const success = db.add('todos', {\n    id: parseInt(todo.id),\n    message: todo.message,\n  });\n  return { success };\n}\n"}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Next, update ",["$","code",null,{"children":"libs/data-access/src/index.ts"}]]}],["$","$Ld",null,{"language":"ts","fileName":"libs/data-access/src/index.ts","highlightLines":[],"lineGroups":{},"command":"","title":"","path":"","skipRescope":false,"enableCopy":true,"lineWrap":0,"children":"export * from './lib/todo.context';\nexport * from './lib/api';\nexport * from './lib/todo';\n"}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Finally, let's update ",["$","code",null,{"children":"apps/todo/src/routes/todo/index.tsx"}]," to use our newly created functions:"]}],["$","$Ld",null,{"language":"tsx","fileName":"apps/todo/src/routes/todo/index.tsx","highlightLines":[],"lineGroups":{},"command":"","title":"","path":"","skipRescope":false,"enableCopy":true,"lineWrap":0,"children":"$10"}],["$","p",null,{"children":["If you run ",["$","code",null,{"children":"nx serve todo"}]," again, you'll notice that our refactor will not have changed anything for the user, but it has made the codebase more manageable!"]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Now, if we need to update the logic for loading or adding todos, we only need to retest the library, and not the full application, improving our CI times!"}],["$","p",null,{"children":["$","img",null,{"src":"/documentation/blog/images/2023-08-15/bodyimg6.webp","alt":"","loading":"lazy"}]}],["$","h2",null,{"id":"conclusion","className":"group scroll-mt-20","children":["Conclusion",["$","$Lb",null,{"aria-hidden":"true","href":"#conclusion","children":["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","fill":"none","viewBox":"0 0 24 create a todo app that showcases efficient development practices and modular design.
